creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to daniel.engberg.lists from comment #1)
Thanks but no (outside of scope). After ports r527163 the port no longer relies on semi-manually generated files. USE_GITHUB makes it easy to apply upstream fixes (via PATCH_SITES+PATCHFILES), test development snapshots (e.g., when upstreaming) and puts *less* trust on human factor (to not screwup or introduce malware).
